name: shop_hint_packs
description: Three tiers of the SAME hint token: a glass lightbulb with a warm glowing filament, a golden four-point star spark rising from its top, and a green coiled screw base with a small red bookmark tab. Tiers: one lightbulb; three lightbulbs fanned side by side; five lightbulbs in a gleaming cluster.
prompt_extra: every cell repeats the identical lightbulb hint token — glass bulb, golden star spark on top, green screw base; NOT a coin, NOT a gem; only count and arrangement grow per tier
